uplink.description: GNSS fix with real motion (moving) inside geofence
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (0x04/0x88 LOCATION: lat=37.123456, lon=-122.123456; status low nibble 0x02=moving, high nibble 0x00=inside). expected.data authored from the normalized mapping; verified the wire-level field reads match reference/upstream-codec.js (upstream emits latitude/longitude/motion_status=moving/geofence_status=inside).

uplink.description: Battery + temperature + GNSS fix, motion stopped outside geofence
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (0x01/0x75 battery=77%, 0x03/0x67 temp=23.5C, 0x04/0x88 LOCATION lat=-33.86882 lon=151.20929; status 0x13 low nibble 0x03=stop, high nibble 0x01=outside). Battery is a percentage so it maps to batteryPercent (not volts). Stop is not real motion so action.motion.detected=false. Verified field reads against reference/upstream-codec.js (upstream: battery=77, temperature=23.5, motion_status=stop, geofence_status=outside).

Upstream TTN example INPUT (Initial Connection). expected.data authored as camelCase extras; verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (upstream snake_case: device_status=on, ipso_version=v0.1, sn=6745e27566240008, hardware_version=v1.1, firmware_version=v1.2).
Synthetic payload with no recognized Milesight channel/type pair; decoder returns an error rather than a bare {}.
